signUpInstructions: Check laughingbuddhacomedy.com/mics for updated schedule and sign-up info
otherRules: No guests are required to perform at our open mics. There is a one-item minimum for all comics and guests. You must purchase your item and check in with the host before your name is added to the lineup. Spots are 5 minutes; you may have extra time if we are not full. You must be 18 and older to register, or 16 accompanied by a parent or guardian. Please note, the venue does receive last-minute bookings, which can interfere with our mics. If this happens, we will let you know beforehand. Phone/Notes: You may use your phone or notes on stage. Please do not use your phone while in the audience. You may record your performance. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges are permitted.

If this happens, we will let you know beforehand. Phone/Notes: You may use your phone or notes on stage. Please do not use your phone while in the audience. You may record your performance. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges are permitted.
